BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: RHIZOME COMMUNICATIONS INC co NEW MUSEUM OF CONTEMPORARY ART

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO PRESENT NEW MEDIA ART TO THE PUBLIC, FOSTER COMMUNICATION AND CRITICAL DIALOGUE ABOUT NEW ART, AND TO PRESERVE MEDIA ART FOR THE FUTURE.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO CHAMPION BORN-DIGITAL ART AND CULTURE THROUGH COMMISSIONS, EXHIBITION, CRITICAL PUBLISHING, AND PRESERVATION PROGRAMS.
IRS990.Desc: TO EXPOSE THE PUBLIC TO WORKS OF BOTH EMERGING AND ESTABLISHED MEDIA ARTISTS, THROUGH A WEBSITE, EMAIL LISTS AND PROGRAM EVENTS.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: Other Income Part II, Line 10 Description: ADVERTISING INCOME 2017: 5915. 2018: 5522. 2019: 6384. 2020: 475. 2021: 650. Description: MISCELLANEOUS REVENUE 2017: 1524. 2018: 2032. 2019: 0. 2020: 0. 2021: 486. Description: LICENSING FEES 2019: 25000. 2020: 20000.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The Organization has evaluated its current tax positions and has concluded that as of June 30, 2022, the Organization does not have any significant uncertain tax positions for which a reserve would be necessary.
SENIOR MANAGEMENT REVIEWS AND APPROVES AND SUBMITS TO BOARD OF TRUSTEES.
ALL TRUSTEES AND EMPLOYEES ARE REQUIRED TO SIGN AN ETHICS/CONFLICTS OF INTEREST POLICY, AND THIS IS REVIEWED ANNUALLY FOR COMPLETENESS.
THE DIRECTOR POSITION IS APPROVED BY THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES. A COMPETITIVE SEARCH IS CONDUCTED AND THE BOARD APPROVES THE SALARY OF THE DIRECTOR.
A COMPETITIVE SEARCH IS CONDUCTED FOR ALL POSITIONS. THE DIRECTOR PROPOSES SALARIES FOR ALL OTHER EMPLOYEES, BUT THE SALARY BUDGET IS APPROVED BY THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES.
